name: KernelGenBench
description: KernelGenBench is a unified benchmark for evaluating LLM- and agent-generated Triton kernels across diverse operator sources and heterogeneous hardware platforms. It comprises two sub-benchmarks: KernelGenBench-MS (210 operators from PyTorch ATen, vLLM, and cuBLAS sources) and KernelGenBench-MC (110 ATen operators evaluated across six hardware platforms). The benchmark provides a distributed sandbox infrastructure, a three-tier anti-hack mechanism, and a multi-dimensional evaluation protocol measuring functional correctness, execution speedup, and agentic cost efficiency.

distribution.name: prompts
distribution.description: 210 operator task prompts in Markdown format, one per operator (aten, vllm13, cublas sources)

recordSet.name: operators
recordSet.description: 210 operators across three sources for Triton kernel generation evaluation.

field.name: source
field.description: Operator source: aten, vllm13, or cublas
